## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What problem does this PR solve? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick one -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (hook, skill, command, or profile)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Breaking change (explain in the Notes section below)

## Verification

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check hooks/ tests/ scripts/` passes
- [ ] `mypy hooks/` passes (or new issues are documented and justified)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (`README.md`, `docs/*.md`, schema, or profile files)
- [ ] New hooks/skills have tests in `tests/`

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything unusual? Trade-offs you made? Follow-up items you're explicitly deferring? -->
